description: Perform a descriptive analysis of the 'Revise' variable using the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset. The analysis must include skewness, standard error of skewness, kurtosis, and the 15th and 85th percentiles. Generate a box plot for this variable that includes a mean marker. Save the Jamovi analysis file to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Revision_Distribution.omv'. Additionally, create a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/cutoffs_report.txt' containing the 15th percentile, 85th percentile, skewness value, and standard error of skewness (in that order), with each value on its own line and rounded to two decimal places.
